pricklensmachines.ponder.kiln.text_1: To use the Kiln Controller, build a structure around it.
pricklensmachines.ponder.kiln.text_2: The structure must have least 3 these layers.
pricklensmachines.ponder.kiln.text_3: Any structural block can be replaced with a hatch of any type.
pricklensmachines.ponder.kiln.text_4: You can increase the height up to 6 layers to improve processing speed.
pricklensmachines.ponder.kiln.text_5: Note that taller structures will consume fuel faster.
